title: Marvell Technology Earnings: Latest Report and Financials
text: Marvell Technology demonstrated exceptional earnings performance with multiple consecutive beats across quarters. Recent results for Q4 FY2026 showed EPS of $0.80, exceeding consensus of $0.71 by 12.68%. The company's revenue trajectory shows strong acceleration, with fiscal 2026 full-year revenue of $8.195 billion, up 42% year-over-year. Data center segment revenue surpassed $6 billion, representing 46% year-over-year growth and constituting the primary revenue driver. Custom silicon revenue doubled in fiscal 2026 and is projected to double again by fiscal 2028. The company revised upward its FY2027 guidance to approach $11 billion revenue, more than 30% year-over-year growth, with FY2028 projected near $15 billion. Wall Street consensus rates Marvell a Strong Buy with 22 Buys and 4 Holds. Price targets have been raised significantly by major analysts following recent guidance raises.
